isolation.boundary: Local dashboard surface with seeded local data only

assertionResults.title: Resolution toggle and range presets work
assertionResults.reason: Default and range presets behaved as expected, and Daily changed rendering, but Monthly did not produce distinct monthly-aggregated point rendering (it matched Weekly rendering with unchanged axis cadence and point density).

steps.action: Open /dashboard and switch to Trend view
steps.expected: Trend view loads with default 30D + 7-Day Avg
steps.observed: Trend tab selected with 30D selected and Weekly selected (UI label for 7-Day Avg). URL: /dashboard?view=trend&date=2026-04-05&range=30&smoothing=weekly
Daily selected and URL changed to smoothing=daily. DOM rendering check: lines=0, scatterSymbols=30 on 30D (raw points only), consistent with raw-dot style.

Monthly selected and URL changed to smoothing=monthly, but rendering metrics matched Weekly (30D: lines=1 + scatterSymbols=30; 1Y: lines=1 + scatterSymbols=104). X-axis labels remained unchanged versus Weekly, indicating no visible monthly aggregation behavior.

steps.expected: Time axis/data window updates to 7 days
steps.observed: 7D selected; x-axis labels moved to Mar 30-Apr 5 window; symbols=7; URL range=7.

steps.expected: Time axis/data window updates to 30 days
steps.observed: 30D selected; x-axis labels moved to Mar 9-Apr 5 window; symbols=30; URL range=30.

steps.expected: Time axis/data window updates to 90 days
steps.observed: 90D selected; x-axis labels moved to Jan 13-Apr 5 window; symbols=90; URL range=90.

steps.expected: Time axis/data window updates to 1 year
steps.observed: 1Y selected; x-axis labels moved to Dec 29-Apr 5 span; symbols=104 (available seeded period), URL range=365.

assertionResults.issues: Monthly resolution toggle updates selected state/query param but does not visibly change chart into monthly-aggregated points.

stepsTaken: Started agent-browser session trend-uitrd003-round9 and authenticated via local mock-auth cookie for user_test_001 after sign-in redirect.
Navigated to Trend tab, captured default state evidence, then toggled Daily and Monthly and captured evidence/DOM observations.
Exercised all presets (7D/30D/90D/1Y), captured screenshot evidence for each, and recorded axis/data-window observations.
Checked browser errors (none) and captured supplemental curl network evidence because agent-browser request capture returned empty.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned 'No requests captured' for /api/views/trend.
frictions.resolution: Collected equivalent request/response evidence via authenticated curl calls and saved summary artifact.

frictions.description: UI resolution label is 'Weekly' rather than literal '7-Day Avg' wording in assertion text.
frictions.resolution: Mapped Weekly state to query parameter smoothing=weekly and verified default state accordingly.

summary: VAL-UITRD-003 failed: default 30D+Weekly and all range presets updated correctly, Daily changed rendering, but Monthly did not produce a distinct monthly-aggregated rendering.
